scope: P0 authenticated draft preview and explicit open-to-visitors lifecycle repair

hosted_smoke.reason: A usable hosted owner login/session was not available from the local verification context.

preview_owner_access.proof: Owner preview renders the saved draft marker even when the optional owner-node hydration request is forced to fail.

preview_anonymous_denial.proof: Anonymous and authenticated non-owner preview attempts are denied and do not render the draft marker.

publish_button_enabled.proof: A valid first saved draft has an enabled primary Open room to visitors action; first publication is not classified as critical.

publish_confirmation.proof: A visible pointer click opens the labelled confirmation dialog and requires an explicit Open to visitors action.

publish_request_sent.proof: Playwright observed a successful POST to the owner editor publish route after dialog confirmation.

public_unchanged_before_publish.proof: The saved draft marker is absent from the anonymous public room before confirmation.

preview_reflects_draft.proof: Authenticated preview displays the saved draft marker and retains noindex metadata.

public_updates_after_publish.proof: The public room displays the marker only after the confirmed publish request.

RoomKey_published_only.proof: RoomKey renders the marker after publish through the published state; existing backend/public boundary tests also passed.

cleanup_status.proof: Browser proof uses resettable local mock state; hosted smoke was not run and no live room copy was changed.

tests.name: Focused frontend contract tests
tests.command: node --test --experimental-strip-types lib/editor/readiness.test.ts lib/presence/render/resolver.test.ts lib/presence/widgets/registry.test.ts lib/presence/option-packs/registry.test.ts lib/presence/typography/registry.test.ts lib/editor/canvasModel.test.ts lib/editor/canvasMutations.test.ts lib/editor/assetValidator.test.ts lib/editor/diffEngine.test.ts lib/api/editor.test.ts lib/api/presenceGraph.test.ts

tests.name: Backend editor, graph, RoomKey and public boundary tests
Relevant Playwright Studio and public lifecycle tests
tests.command: cmd /c npx playwright test tests/e2e/canvas-builder-preview-publish-p0.spec.ts tests/e2e/canvas-builder-parity.spec.ts tests/e2e/presence-canvas-direct-manipulation.spec.ts tests/e2e/presence-studio-editor.spec.ts tests/e2e/presence-pass-paths.spec.ts --workers=1 --retries=0 --reporter=list
